payload.answer: The new statement conflicts with the existing memory about whether Sam from Goldman has children. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: approve_supersession: Treat the new statement as replacing the existing memory, so Sam from Goldman is now considered to have no children.
keep_both: Keep both statements because they may refer to different Sams, different contexts, or uncertainty.
reject_new: Keep the existing memory that Sam from Goldman has two children and do not use the new statement.
edit: Clarify or revise the memory, for example by specifying which Sam from Goldman is meant or adding timing/context.
